enrichment.summary: Kyle briefly explains why he skipped his previous day's vlog — he was exhausted after a full day of cycling 10 miles, cleaning two houses, mowing a lawn, and visiting his mom. He woke up refreshed and plans to work on his computer that day, and mentions upcoming gecko footage.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves sleeping a lot and waking up fully rested

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-LOG. For the 1st of May 2013, I didn't do my V-LOG last night
Because I got in bed because I was so tired. And then once I was in bed, I was like, oh
Man, I'm staying here. So yeah, it was that. So I forgot I need to remember my bad. I was
Tired yesterday because yesterday I got up and then I had to ride my bicycle 10 miles
To do some house. And then I went to another one place and then I rode over and after cleaning
This, doing the windows in the second house, I went and mowed the lawn on my friend and
Then my mom called me. Let me come over and help her about, I didn't do that much for her
Though. She just called me to hang out or something. Then I came back and at six and
I worked a little bit on my computer, but then I got, I was just like, I was so tired that
My brain wasn't working totally. So I was like, you know what, let's just go to bed. It was
Like seven or something, six or something and got in bed and then I just got up now and it's
Like seven in the morning. So I love it. I love sleeping a lot and then being rested the
Next day. So, uh, yeah. So that means I think today I'll have energy to, uh, to work on the
Computer this day. Uh, and that's about, that's all I have to say about that. I got some cool
Footage of my geckos. I'll do a video about that soon. Okay. Peace out.
